info.name: GeoTag Photos
info.summary: Add GPS geolocation tags to your photos
info.description:
Add GPS EXIF metadata to JPEG photos directly from the Nextcloud Files app. Once tagged, photos will appear in Nextcloud Maps and Memories after a metadata rescan (`occ maps:scan-photos`).
Features: - Add or replace GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude, optional altitude) on JPEG photos with one click - Read and display existing GPS coordinates before overwriting - Clear GPS data from a photo - Tag multiple photos with the same coordinates in one action - Uses exiftool for reliable, standards-compliant EXIF manipulation - Only modifies GPS-related EXIF fields — all other metadata is preserved
Creator: Dimitris Vagiakakos (@sv1sjp) — https://www.tuxhouse.eu
info.author: Dimitris Vagiakakos (@sv1sjp)
